title: SolarWinds Alert
description: Schema for a SolarWinds monitoring alert triggered by threshold violations or status changes on monitored entities.

alertId.description: Unique identifier for the alert instance

alertName.description: Display name of the alert definition

triggeredAt.description: Timestamp when the alert was triggered

resetAt.description: Timestamp when the alert was reset, null if still active

acknowledged.description: Whether the alert has been acknowledged by an operator

acknowledgedBy.description: Username of the operator who acknowledged the alert

message.description: Alert message with details about the triggering condition

entityType.description: Type of the monitored entity that triggered the alert

entityUri.description: SWIS URI of the entity that triggered the alert

entityCaption.description: Display name of the triggering entity

notes.description: Additional notes or annotations on the alert

TriggerCondition.description: Condition that caused the alert to trigger

currentValue.description: Current value of the monitored property

duration.description: Duration in seconds the condition must persist before triggering
